author: y4rr
content: Phase 5 V10: paged attention shipped. AttnLayerStore (per-layer LRU, host bf16 + VRAM hot set), enable_paged_attention method on PagedLlamaInferencer (downloads existing q/k/v/o slices to host, replaces with empty placeholders, installs in store). Forward dispatches: ensure_layer_resident at start of each layer's attention block, then reads q_proj/k_proj/v_proj/o_proj from the AttnVramLayer view. End-to-end on Llama 3 8B (PAGED_ATTN_BUDGET_MB=1024 = ~12 layers fit, 20 evict per forward): cos_sim = 1.000000, paged_argmax = dense_argmax = 311, hit_rate = 99.85%, fault_stall p99 = 8 ms, 0.37s/forward (vs 0.17s without paged-attn). 83 tests pass.
